name: num-style-link-chain
description: abstractNum 0 has numStyleLink='OutlineList' (no levels). abstractNum 1 has styleLink='OutlineList' with actual levels. Paragraphs using numId=1 (-> abstractNum 0) should follow the chain to get levels from abstractNum 1.
expected_behavior: Paragraphs produce '1.', '2.', 'a)' via the numStyleLink chain.
